generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor for first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission (gearwheel) for first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox for first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for controlling position, speed, and acceleration inputs"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on motor for position and angular velocity measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted, AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind gearbox for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LoadPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensors for measuring input current (I_M)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance TorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Torque sensor for measuring torque in first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance AccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Accelerometer for measuring acceleration in first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AccelerationDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance LoadPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensors
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueSensor
]

instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AccelerationSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SensorCurrentDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Sensor data trace for current"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorTorqueDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Sensor data trace for torque"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorAngularVelocityDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Sensor data trace for angular velocity"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural models of first axis"
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural models of first axis"
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint friction"
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for joint friction"
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for joint friction"
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for joint friction"
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for metadata and traceability"
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for modeling"

]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulations"

]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables InputCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorPositionDataTransmitted, LoadPositionDataTransmitted, TorqueDataTransmitted, AccelerationDataTransmitted, AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for integrated visualization"

]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

]

    base:desc "Insights into friction dynamics for motion accuracy improvement"
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateDecision : DTDFVocab:Action [

]

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

]

]

]

    base:desc "Data identification for friction modeling"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance IterativeRefinement : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Iterative refinement of friction models with traceability of data origins"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance TwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains FirstAxis, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNController, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensors, TorqueSensor, AccelerationSensor, SysMLBDDModel, SysMLIBDModel, CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel, AssetAdministrationShell, SysMLEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, MQTTEnabler, AASEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler, FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService, DashboardVisualizationService, ProblemIdentification, AssetModelAnalysis, DataIdentification, IterativeRefinement
]

]
